Subject: AI Code Review Benchmarking 2026

References: <post-189006343@substack.com>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="c13877e0dba01731464c380e01fdeb5ae37c39799045edc705091c0a71b7"

View this post on the web at https://aiswaryaentelligenceai.substack.com/p/ai-code-review-benchmarking-2026

Most engineering teams have never measured whether their AI code reviewer actually works. Not in any rigorous way.
So we did.
We tested 7 tools on 67 real bugs across Cal.com, Sentry, Discourse, Keycloak, and Grafana. Every bug shipped to production, broke something, and required a real fix. Race conditions, security vulnerabilities, breaking API changes, logic errors.
But don’t take our word for it. We built a live dashboard where you can connect your own bot and see exactly where it stands.

Unsubscribe https://substack..1yipaAe4CFNG8HQQQFRT4T07V-gmeGV7_zy_OvIU_BA?
